description_long: This object is a rectangular, block-shaped lotion bar with softly rounded edges and a smooth, creamy white surface. The top and sides are coated in a thick, even layer of white, suggesting a solidified lotion or balm. The base and lower sides reveal a pale beige or tan color, indicating a different material or the natural color of the lotion base. There are no visible seams, openings, or branding, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The surface appears matte and slightly velvety, with no gloss or shine. Its compact size and solid form suggest it is intended for direct application by hand.
description: A rectangular, block-shaped solid lotion bar with a creamy white top and pale beige sides, featuring a smooth, matte finish and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, creamy white top surface with softly rounded edges and a hint of beige on the lower sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular profile, with the white top layer and a clear transition to the beige base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the white top and the symmetrical beige sides, emphasizing the blocky shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the white top and beige base with smooth, rounded corners.
